bug_report.summary: “Add group” control renders as a large bottom button instead of the prior compact sidebar control
steps_to_reproduce: Create a new library (File → New library → New empty library).
Open the File menu (and/or proceed to save the library).
Look at the bottom of the left sidebar.
expected_behaviors: “Add group” appears in the same location/style as before (compact control in the sidebar; not replacing other panes).
actual_behaviors: After the change, “Add group” appears as a large button at the bottom of the sidebar, coinciding with the disappearance of the Web search pane content.

bug_report.summary: Preferences dialog footer buttons changed: Cancel button appears (and looks disabled) only after the change
steps_to_reproduce: Look at the bottom-right footer buttons.
expected_behaviors: Preferences dialog footer controls should be consistent with prior behavior (same buttons and enabled/disabled state).
actual_behaviors: After the change, a Cancel button is present next to Save (and appears disabled), whereas before the change only the Save button is visible (no Cancel button shown).

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering

bug_report.summary: ‘Restart required’ modal dialog content corrupted and OK button missing/blank after export-preferences save
steps_to_reproduce: Use the export preferences function and complete the Save action in the system file chooser (as in the scenario).
Observe the resulting ‘Restart required’ modal dialog.
expected_behaviors: The ‘Restart required’ dialog should show the correct restart message (e.g., reason for restart) and provide a visible actionable button such as ‘OK’ to dismiss it.
actual_behaviors: The ‘Restart required’ dialog displays incorrect/garbled content (shows underlying Preferences page text like ‘User interface’ and ‘Do not show donation prompt again’) and the expected ‘OK’ button is not visible (button area appears blank).
